15.content: Ahhh finally some privacy from my family. So Lisa enjoys her privacy, and she starts exploring her vagina and breasts. A few hours later she decides to play her saxophone while still naked. Did anyone see her through her window and did they get caught?

152.title: Milhouse

info.brief_description: How does she react to family walking in on her.
info.description: It all begins after school on a Friday. So Homer is at Moe's, Bart is at detention, Marge is cleaning and taking care of Maggie. Which leaves us to see what Lisa is doing besides homework and playing her saxophone. So Lisa is done with her homework and playing her saxophone, and so she starts to think. Hmm I haven't explored my body since mom caught me in front of Bart when I was 2 years old. So lets see who interrupts Lisa and how does she react.
info.pretty_title: Lisa decides to study her body
